purpose: Full asset-requirements manifest profile for pseudo-3D-ready InnsmouthIsland asset generation and runtime translation.

ORBDimensionView: foreground occlusion and adjacent plane stitching
ORBKinetics: deterministic runtime approximation from authored silhouettes
ORBGlue: binding anchor and silhouette data to gameplay state
equipment socket and cosmetic attachment binding
precision telemetry and discovery progression linkage

anchor_nodes.representation: hidden alpha-zero distinct-color tether markers in transparent canvas margins

detection_silhouettes.policy: Every gameplay-relevant asset family must define an invisible collision or interaction silhouette tighter than decorative overflow.
detection_silhouettes.precision_goal: pixel-precise authoring intent even if runtime begins with simplified silhouette approximation

shading.policy: single dominant light family with coherent highlight, shadow, and curvature cues for pseudo-3D depth translation

translation.policy: assets must decompose into coherent plane groups for cubic-space stitching on a 2D canvas

weapons: decorative overflow excluded from collision intent
